has-7-section-adr.evidence: Missing multiple required sections. Has: Title, Status, Context, Decision Drivers, Options Considered, Recommendation, Discussion Points, Consequences (empty), Related. Missing: Decision (no actual decision made), Compliance, Notes. The 'Recommendation' says 'No recommendation at this stage.' Consequences section is empty with '(pending)' placeholders.

has-both-positive-and-negative-consequen.evidence: Consequences section is entirely empty with '(pending)' placeholders. No actual positive or negative consequences listed.

uses-active-voice-with-why.evidence: No Decision section with active voice. The 'Recommendation' section explicitly states 'No recommendation at this stage.' No 'We will...' statement and no WHY reasoning.

detects-anti-patterns.evidence: No named anti-patterns or diagnosis of decision-making dysfunction.

has-status-with-lifecycle.evidence: Status is 'Proposed'. The scenario calls for RFC with deadline (team discussion wanted). While the review meeting date appears in the header metadata, the status itself does not reflect RFC status or include a deadline.

applies-significance-dimensions.evidence: No reference to the 5 significance dimensions.

specifies-enforcement.evidence: No Compliance section. No enforcement mechanism specified.
